heroHeadline: Bad Bunny: Grammy Album of the Year, Super Bowl Headliner, Tokyo Billions Club Live Film Now Streaming
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, 30 individual songs crossing 1 billion streams, and a historic Super Bowl halftime performance. Billions Club Live concert film from Tokyo now streaming globally on Spotify. European leg of the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour begins May 22, 2026 in Barcelona.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, and major media
